author: barnabasbusa
content: <@466102668138512394> is pr 1354 ready to be merged?

author: barnabasbusa
content:
I'd like to see a few adjustments to it actually:

- remove the dashboard_enabled boolean. Just always have it enabled if we have grafana enabled. 
- Sanity checker should check for possible zkvm configurations. need to have kind/proof_type/etc in the sanity checker. 
- Add more comments on all the possible zkvms configs that are possible right now the comment is pretty barebone. 
- Wouldn't withness_timeout_secs/proof_cache_size be a config parameter of zkvms subgroup? Do we wanna keep these values configurable? If not, worth considering dropping it, we already have too many config options lol

author: barnabasbusa
content: <@402080271563751435> any progress on moving the gpu specific fields to GpuConfig?

author: han0110
content:
> Sanity checker should check for possible zkvm configurations. need to have kind/proof_type/etc in the sanity checker.
Sure, will do so (was just afraid that if it is too strict, it'd need frequent update on `ethereum-package` when `zkboost` has breaking changes)

> Wouldn't withness_timeout_secs/proof_cache_size be a config parameter of zkvms subgroup?
Right, it makes sense to move `proof_*` to zkvm subgroup, and will just hardcode the config `withness_*` for now until someone need to configure that

author: barnabasbusa
content: I prefer to have better UX > less frequent updates

author: barnabasbusa
content: I just want ppl to be able to spin up zkvm stuff as fast as possible with as little config extras as possible

author: barnabasbusa
content: so we need to have some sane defaults enabled

author: barnabasbusa
content: alos might worth having a default dummy zkboost enabled by default in case zkboost is enabled

author: taulepton_
content: Yep, I’ve got all the changes implemented locally. I’m catching a flight this morning so I’ll push later this evening.

author: barnabasbusa
content: Push then I can review and merge it in by the time you land

content: I’m on the road atm, will try and find an opportunity once I get to the airport
